workLog.step: Self-found defect: original strip_informational_sections did not mask fenced code blocks, so triple-backtick markdown samples containing heading-like text were over-stripped. Added _mask_code_blocks pre-pass for triple-backtick fences (commit dfcda97)
Extended _mask_code_blocks to also mask tilde-fenced and HTML <pre> code blocks for completeness across 3 fence styles (commit af3f8d5)

Pre-mortem analyst surfaced bypass-label case sensitivity gap and missing audit signal. Made label match case-insensitive; emit GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY (human-readable + BYPASSED marker) and GITHUB_OUTPUT (bypass_used/bypass_label/bypass_count). Filed #1782 for separate over-strip claim issue (commit 65a5371)
Documented case-insensitive bypass match and audit summary in CONTRIBUTING.md (commit f9c62c1)

Independent codex review: tightened heading regex to H2-only with full-line anchor (`^##\s+...\s*$`) so `## Notes on iteration 2` is NOT stripped; added BYPASSED workflow surface (alertType=WARNING, emoji, table cell `BYPASSED (label override)`) when bypass fires (commit 2d57290)

Closed coverage gaps to 100% block + branch via 117 tests covering pos+neg+edge: every parser pattern, every strip type, all 3 fence styles, case variants, whitespace tolerance, prefix-extended headings, H3/H4/H5 nesting, bypass label edge cases, defensive OSError on audit writes (commit 3eb5663)
Self /review caught H3+ sub-heading terminator gap: tightened terminator to `(?=^##(?!#)|\Z)` so H3+ sub-headings inside a stripped section are not exposed as phantom claims (commit bafbbe7)

Review-army (5 parallel agents) surfaced 4 P0/P1 findings: GITHUB_OUTPUT log injection (CWE-117), tilde fence unanchored, backtick markdown break in audit body, Issue.severity weak typing. Fixed: control-char sanitizer `re.sub(r'[\x00-\x1f\x7f=]', '_', ...)`, anchored tilde fence, backtick->apostrophe in markdown body, promoted Issue.severity to Literal['CRITICAL','WARNING'] with __post_init__ check (commit 3d49ea9)

Re-review surfaced control-char sanitizer gap (missed certain control chars) and silent-mutation issue. Expanded sanitizer character class; added _warn_if_mutated stderr WARNING when sanitization changes input; workflow empty-result guard treats empty DESCRIPTION_RESULT as ERROR before downstream branches (commit a477eb2)

Re-review surfaced ADR-035 exit-code conflation: workflow if/else mapped exit codes incorrectly so config errors (rc=2) were misreported as content-validation FAIL. Replaced with `case "$rc"` mapping ADR-035 exit codes (0->PASS, 1->FAIL, 2->ERROR, *->ERROR); BYPASSED table-cell rendering gated on DESCRIPTION_RESULT -ne ERROR so script errors stay visible (commit 3aafad2)

Final: ran pytest tests/test_validation_pr_description.py -q (117 passed), pytest tests/ -q --ignore=tests/integration (7175 passed, 3 skipped), uv run ruff check (clean), uv run mypy on changed file (clean), uv run pytest --cov --cov-branch (100%/218 stmts/66 branches/0 missing); live e2e against PR #1781 with bypass label applied exits 0 with audit emission
